sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84628" key="polu/arkus" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολῠ´-αρκῠς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῠος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n84628.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with many nets,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἄγρη</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:4:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.10</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
